data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. CASINO SHAW progressive mare who gives the indication the 1400m will suit. Third-up now after she sat up on the speed for a courageous third over 1200m at this track. McLucas sticks and finds the right race. 7. MISS SCOOP another with her hoof on the till. Went out fast and knocked up late to finish second over 1200m here. Fitter now and gets a better set-up for this. Each-way. 10. SPIELE tough old mare who ran a better race when fourth over 1400m here. Races best with runs spaced and senior rider hops aboard. Place best. 1. VILLA SEVENTYNINE stepping out at this circuit for the first time. Last appeared when he finished fourth over 1600m at Cranbourne on April 3. Can contest for a place.","runners":[8,7,10,1],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: SAPPHIRE COAST-R5-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
